children.text: local educational agencies;
Indian tribes, as provided under subsection (c)(1);
Indian organizations, as provided under subsection (c)(1);

children.label: A
children.text: provides an assurance that the eligible Indian children served by such local educational agency will receive the services of the programs funded under this subpart; and

children.label: B
children.text: is subject to all the requirements, assurances, and obligations applicable to local educational agencies under this subpart; and
Indian community-based organizations, as provided under subsection (d)(1).

children.label: A
children.text: was at least 10; or

children.label: B
children.text: constituted not less than 25 percent of the total number of individuals enrolled in the schools of such agency.

children.label: A
children.text: represents not less than 25 percent of the eligible Indian children who are served by such local educational agency; and

children.label: B
children.text: requests that the local educational agency enter into a cooperative agreement under this subpart.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: 3 Exclusion
children.text: The requirement of paragraph (1) shall not apply in Alaska, California, or Oklahoma, or with respect to any local educational agency located on, or in proximity to, a reservation.

children.heading: Indian tribes and Indian organizations
children.label: c Indian tribes and Indian organizations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If a local educational agency that is otherwise eligible for a grant under this subpart does not establish a committee under for such grant, an Indian tribe, an Indian organization, or a consortium of such entities, that represents more than one-half of the eligible Indian children who are served by such local educational agency may apply for such grant.section 7424(c)(4) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall treat each Indian tribe, Indian organization, or consortium of such entities applying for a grant pursuant to paragraph (1) as if such tribe, Indian organization, or consortium were a local educational agency for purposes of this subpart.

children.heading: Exceptions
children.label: B Exceptions
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraph (A), such Indian tribe, Indian organization, or consortium shall not be subject to the requirements of subsections (b)(7) or (c)(4) of or section 7428(c) or 7429 of this title.section 7424 of this title

children.heading: Assurance to serve all Indian children
children.label: 3 Assurance to serve all Indian children
children.text: An Indian tribe, Indian organization, or consortium of such entities that is eligible to apply for a grant under paragraph (1) shall include, in the application required under , an assurance that the entity will use the grant funds to provide services to all Indian students served by the local educational agency.section 7424 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If no local educational agency pursuant to subsection (b), and no Indian tribe, Indian organization, or consortium pursuant to subsection (c), applies for a grant under this subpart in a particular community, an Indian community-based organization serving the community of the local educational agency may apply for such grant.

children.heading: Applicability of special rule
children.label: 2 Applicability of special rule
children.text: The Secretary shall apply the special rule in subsection (c)(2) to an Indian community-based organization applying for a grant under paragraph (1) in the same manner as such rule applies to an Indian tribe, Indian organization, or consortium described in that subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: is composed primarily of Indian parents, family members, and community members, tribal government education officials, and tribal members, from a specific community;

children.label: B
children.text: assists in the social, cultural, and educational development of Indians in such community;

children.label: C
children.text: meets the unique cultural, language, and academic needs of Indian students; and

children.label: D
children.text: demonstrates organizational and administrative capacity to manage the grant.
